infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GymClash uses your location to track distance and pace during scout workouts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GymClash uses background location to continue tracking your scout workout when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: GymClash reads heart rate and activity data to verify workouts and display live stats.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: GymClash saves your workout summaries to Apple Health.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GymClash uses background location to continue tracking your scout workout when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GymClash uses your location to track distance and pace during scout workouts.
